items.title: Heat's Vladislav Goldin: Extended two-way QO by Miami
items.author: CBS Sports
items.body_excerpt: Heat's Vladislav Goldin: Extended two-way QO by Miami CBS Sports

items.title: The Miami Heat have tendered a two-way qualifying offer to Vladislav Goldin, a league source told @spotrac.com.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
The Miami Heat have tendered a two-way qualifying offer to Vladislav Goldin, a league source told @spotrac.com.

Goldin will now be a restricted free agent this summer.
